## Safety Boundary

Confirm this PR stays public-safe, high-level, and non-sensitive.

This PR should not include:

- private architecture
- internal names
- product mechanics
- detailed workflows
- customer strategy
- market positioning
- private prompts
- proprietary methods
- broker or execution details
- customer data
- performance claims
- financial advice claims
- production readiness claims

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The change is small and reviewable.
- [ ] The change improves the public proof repository.
- [ ] The change stays high-level and non-sensitive.
- [ ] Documentation remains clear and consistent.
- [ ] CI remains passing.
